name: @tuanla90/plugin-line-generator
displayName.vi-VN: Bộ sinh dòng theo quy tắc
description: Turn one parent record into N child rows in one transaction — a configurable JOIN + fan-out generalised into an ordered multi-step JOIN pipeline (each step joins a different config table or follows a relation; output of step N feeds step N+1). One config covers BOM/combo explosion, commission splits, and cost allocation — with cross-relation matching, priority tiers, self-join recursion, group-and-sum, rounding, and a fan-out row cap. Run on demand or auto-run on save, with a dry-run preview + debugger.
